messages.content: You generate only valid python-pptx code. Use XL_CHART_TYPE (not ChartType) for charts; guard slide.shapes.title for None; return only complete runnable Python code without Markdown fences or section headings.

Design a reassuring PowerPoint presentation for policyholders in the Insurance industry explaining our new streamlined claims processing workflow, consisting of exactly 12 slides with a trustworthy theme using blue, white, and light gray accents. Save the file as "Claims_Process.pptx". All content should be written in French using 16:9 Widescreen slide dimensions. Do not use any external APIs or web scraping; rely solely on locally generated placeholder data for insurance processing steps. When creating charts, you must use `XL_CHART_TYPE` (e.g., `XL_CHART_TYPE.LINE_MARKERS`) instead of importing or using `ChartType` from `pptx.enum.chart`. Before attempting to set the text of a slide's title shape, you must first verify that `slide.shapes.title is not None` and only then access `.text`. Your response must contain distinct # Thinking and # Assistant sections. Code blocks must be enclosed in ```python fences, and all non-code text explanations must be enclosed in ```text fences.

from pptx import Presentation
from pptx.util import Inches, Pt
from pptx.dml.color import RGBColor
from pptx.enum.text import PP_ALIGN
from pptx.enum.shapes import MSO_SHAPE
from pptx.enum.chart import XL_CHART_TYPE
from pptx.chart.data import CategoryChartData
import os


SLIDE_WIDTH = Inches(13.33)
SLIDE_HEIGHT = Inches(7.5)

PRIMARY_BLUE = RGBColor(0, 61, 165)
DARK_NAVY = RGBColor(10, 31, 68)
LIGHT_GRAY = RGBColor(232, 236, 242)
WHITE = RGBColor(255, 255, 255)
ACCENT_TEAL = RGBColor(0, 180, 216)
SUCCESS_GREEN = RGBColor(46, 204, 113)
MEDIUM_GRAY = RGBColor(120, 130, 140)

FONT_HEADING = "Calibri"
FONT_BODY = "Calibri"


def hex_to_rgb(hex_str):
    h = hex_str.lstrip("#")
    return RGBColor(int(h[0:2], 16), int(h[2:4], 16), int(h[4:6], 16))


def set_slide_background(slide, color_hex="#FFFFFF"):
    background = slide.background
    fill = background.fill
    fill.solid()
    fill.fore_color.rgb = hex_to_rgb(color_hex)


def add_text_box(slide, x, y, w, h, text, font_size=14, bold=False, color=DARK_NAVY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.LEFT):
    txBox = slide.shapes.add_textbox(x, y, w, h)
    tf = txBox.text_frame
    tf.word_wrap = True
    p = tf.paragraphs[0]
    p.alignment = alignment
    run = p.add_run()
    run.text = text
    run.font.size = Pt(font_size)
    run.font.bold = bold
    run.font.color.rgb = color
    run.font.name = FONT_BODY if not bold else FONT_HEADING
    return txBox


def add_card(slide, x, y, w, h, title, body, icon_shape=None):
    card = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
    card.fill.solid()
    card.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
    card.line.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
    card.line.width = Pt(1)

    title_box = add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.15), w - Inches(0.4), Inches(0.35), title, font_size=12, bold=True, color=PRIMARY_BLUE)
    body_box = add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.2), y + Inches(0.55), w - Inches(0.4), h - Inches(0.7), body, font_size=10, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    if icon_shape:
        icon = slide.shapes.add_shape(icon_shape, x + Inches(0.15), y + Inches(0.12), Inches(0.3), Inches(0.3))
        icon.fill.solid()
        icon.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_TEAL
        icon.line.fill.background()

    return card


def add_section_label(slide, x, y, label_text):
    bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, Inches(0.15), Inches(0.6))
    bar.fill.solid()
    bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_TEAL
    bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y - Inches(0.02), Inches(4), Inches(0.5), label_text, font_size=16, bold=True, color=DARK_NAVY)


def add_footer(slide, page_num, total_pages):
    footer_bg = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(7.1), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(0.4))
    footer_bg.fill.solid()
    footer_bg.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_NAVY
    footer_bg.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.5), Inches(7.12), Inches(6), Inches(0.3), "Assurance Confiance — Votre Partenaire de Confiance", font_size=9, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(11.5), Inches(7.12), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), f"{page_num} / {total_pages}", font_size=9, color=WHITE, alignment=PP_ALIGN.RIGHT)


def add_image_or_placeholder(slide, path, x, y, w, h):
    if os.path.exists(path):
        slide.shapes.add_picture(path, x, y, w, h)
    else:
        placeholder = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x, y, w, h)
        placeholder.fill.solid()
        placeholder.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        placeholder.line.color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
        placeholder.line.width = Pt(2)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.1), y + Inches(0.3), w - Inches(0.2), h - Inches(0.5), "Image / Icône", font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY, alignment=PP_ALIGN.CENTER)


def slide_1_title(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    top_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(3.2))
    top_bar.fill.solid()
    top_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
    top_bar.line.fill.background()

    bottom_wave = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(-1), Inches(2.5), Inches(4), Inches(4))
    bottom_wave.fill.solid()
    bottom_wave.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_TEAL
    bottom_wave.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(0.6), Inches(11), Inches(0.5), "ASSURANCE CONFIANCE", font_size=14, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    title = slide.shapes.title
    if title is not None:
        title.text = ""
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Votre Nouvelle Expérience de Traitement des Sinistres"
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(36)
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = WHITE
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.name = FONT_HEADING

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(3.6), Inches(10), Inches(0.5), "Un processus simplifié pour vous accompagner à chaque étape", font_size=18, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.8), Inches(4.2), Inches(10), Inches(0.4), "Votre satisfaction est notre priorité absolue.", font_size=14, bold=True, color=DARK_NAVY)

    badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(0.8), Inches(5.0), Inches(2.5), Inches(0.6))
    badge.fill.solid()
    badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_TEAL
    badge.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(0.9), Inches(5.05), Inches(2.3), Inches(0.5), "En savoir plus →", font_size=12, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    add_footer(slide, 1, 12)


def slide_2_agenda(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title = slide.shapes.title
    if title is not None:
        title.text = ""
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Au Sommaire"
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_NAVY

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Découvrez les étapes clés de notre nouveau processus", font_size=16, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    items = [
        ("01", "Les défis du processus actuel"),
        ("02", "Notre solution simplifiée"),
        ("03", "Les 4 étapes du traitement"),
        ("04", "Comparaison des délais"),
        ("05", "Vos avantages concrets"),
        ("06", "Support et ressources"),
    ]

    for i, (num, label) in enumerate(items):
        y = Inches(2.1 + i * 0.75)
        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(1.8), y, Inches(0.45), Inches(0.45))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE if i < 3 else LIGHT_GRAY
        circle.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.75), y + Inches(0.02), Inches(0.5), Inches(0.4), num, font_size=14, bold=True, color=WHITE)

        line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(2.35), y + Inches(0.18), Inches(7), Inches(0.03))
        line.fill.solid()
        line.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY if i < 3 else RGBColor(220, 220, 220)
        line.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, Inches(2.5), y + Inches(0.02), Inches(6), Inches(0.4), label, font_size=16, color=DARK_NAVY if i < 3 else MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 2, 12)


def slide_3_challenges(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title = slide.shapes.title
    if title is not None:
        title.text = ""
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Les Défis du Processus Actuel"
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_NAVY

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Nous avons identifié les principaux points d'amélioration", font_size=16, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    challenges = [
        ("Délais longs", "Le traitement moyen de 30 jours crée une incertitude pour nos assurés."),
        ("Manque de transparence", "Les assurés ne peuvent pas suivre l'avancement de leur dossier en temps réel."),
        ("Processus complexe", "La multiplicité des étapes et documents décourage les demandes de sinistre."),
    ]

    for i, (title_text, body) in enumerate(challenges):
        x = Inches(1.2 + i * 3.8)
        card = add_card(slide, x, Inches(2.2), Inches(3.4), Inches(3.5), title_text, body, icon_shape=MSO_SHAPE.CLOUD)

    add_footer(slide, 3, 12)


def slide_4_solution(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title = slide.shapes.title
    if title is not None:
        title.text = ""
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Notre Solution Simplifiée"
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_NAVY

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Un processus repensé pour votre tranquillité d'esprit", font_size=16, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    left_content = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.6), Inches(2.0), Inches(5.8), Inches(4.5))
    left_content.fill.solid()
    left_content.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
    left_content.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(2.3), Inches(5.0), Inches(0.5), "Ce qui change pour vous", font_size=20, bold=True, color=DARK_NAVY)

    points = [
        "Déclaration en ligne 24h/24 et 7j/7",
        "Suivi en temps réel de votre dossier",
        "Réponse garantie sous 48 heures",
        "Paiement accéléré sous 5 jours ouvrables",
    ]

    y_pos = Inches(3.0)
    for point in points:
        dot = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(1.2), y_pos + Inches(0.08), Inches(0.15), Inches(0.15))
        dot.fill.solid()
        dot.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_TEAL
        dot.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), y_pos, Inches(4.5), Inches(0.3), point, font_size=13, color=DARK_NAVY)
        y_pos += Inches(0.5)

    right_image = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(6.8), Inches(2.0), Inches(5.9), Inches(4.5))
    right_image.fill.solid()
    right_image.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
    right_image.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.3), Inches(3.5), Inches(5.0), Inches(1.5), "Votre sinistre traité avec rapidité et simplicité", font_size=24, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.3), Inches(5.0), Inches(5.0), Inches(0.8), "Nous sommes à vos côtés du début à la fin.", font_size=14, color=RGBColor(200, 220, 255))

    add_footer(slide, 4, 12)


def slide_5_step1(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title = slide.shapes.title
    if title is not None:
        title.text = ""
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Étape 1 : Déclarer votre sinistre"
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_NAVY

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Déclarez votre sinistre en quelques clics", font_size=16, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    step_num = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(1.5))
    step_num.fill.solid()
    step_num.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
    step_num.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.3), Inches(2.2), Inches(1.3), Inches(1.0), "1", font_size=48, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.0), Inches(2.2), Inches(9), Inches(0.5), "Déclaration en ligne 24h/24 et 7j/7", font_size=22, bold=True, color=DARK_NAVY)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(3.0), Inches(2.8), Inches(9), Inches(1.5), "Accédez à votre espace personnel sur notre site web ou via l'application mobile. Remplissez le formulaire de déclaration en quelques minutes et téléchargez les documents nécessaires.", font_size=14, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    options = [
        ("Site Web", "www.assurance-confiance.fr"),
        ("Application Mobile", "iOS et Android"),
        ("Téléphone", "0 800 123 456"),
    ]

    for i, (opt_title, opt_desc) in enumerate(options):
        x = Inches(3.0 + i * 3.2)
        card = add_card(slide, x, Inches(4.5), Inches(2.8), Inches(1.8), opt_title, opt_desc)

    add_footer(slide, 5, 12)


def slide_6_step2(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title = slide.shapes.title
    if title is not None:
        title.text = ""
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Étape 2 : Fournir les documents"
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_NAVY

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Envoyez vos documents en toute simplicité", font_size=16, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    step_num = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(1.5))
    step_num.fill.solid()
    step_num.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
    step_num.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.3), Inches(2.2), Inches(1.3), Inches(1.0), "2", font_size=48, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    docs = [
        ("Photo du sinistre", "Prenez des photos claires de la situation"),
        ("Rapport officiel", "Copie du rapport de police ou d'expertise"),
        ("Relevé bancaire", "Pour le virement du remboursement"),
        ("Formulaire signé", "Document disponible en ligne"),
    ]

    for i, (doc_title, doc_desc) in enumerate(docs):
        x = Inches(1.2 + (i % 2) * 5.8)
        y = Inches(3.7 + (i // 2) * 1.6)
        card = add_card(slide, x, y, Inches(5.4), Inches(1.3), doc_title, doc_desc)

    add_footer(slide, 6, 12)


def slide_7_step3(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title = slide.shapes.title
    if title is not None:
        title.text = ""
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Étape 3 : Évaluation par nos experts"
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_NAVY

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Nos experts analysent votre dossier avec soin", font_size=16, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    step_num = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(1.5))
    step_num.fill.solid()
    step_num.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
    step_num.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.3), Inches(2.2), Inches(1.3), Inches(1.0), "3", font_size=48, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    timeline_items = [
        ("J+1", "Réception et enregistrement de votre dossier"),
        ("J+2", "Vérification des documents fournis"),
        ("J+3 à J+5", "Évaluation par un expert dédié"),
        ("J+7", "Décision et proposition de règlement"),
    ]

    for i, (day, desc) in enumerate(timeline_items):
        x = Inches(1.2 + i * 3.0)
        y = Inches(3.5)

        circle = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x, y, Inches(0.6), Inches(0.6))
        circle.fill.solid()
        circle.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_TEAL
        circle.line.fill.background()
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.05), y + Inches(0.12), Inches(0.5), Inches(0.35), str(i + 1), font_size=16, bold=True, color=WHITE)

        if i < len(timeline_items) - 1:
            line = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, x + Inches(0.7), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(2.3), Inches(0.04))
            line.fill.solid()
            line.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
            line.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x - Inches(0.1), y + Inches(0.7), Inches(1.5), Inches(0.3), day, font_size=14, bold=True, color=DARK_NAVY)
        add_text_box(slide, x - Inches(0.1), y + Inches(1.0), Inches(2.8), Inches(0.6), desc, font_size=11, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 7, 12)


def slide_8_step4(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title = slide.shapes.title
    if title is not None:
        title.text = ""
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Étape 4 : Résolution et paiement"
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_NAVY

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Recevez votre indemnisation rapidement", font_size=16, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    step_num = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(1.2), Inches(2.0), Inches(1.5), Inches(1.5))
    step_num.fill.solid()
    step_num.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
    step_num.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.3), Inches(2.2), Inches(1.3), Inches(1.0), "4", font_size=48, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    left_col = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0.6), Inches(3.5), Inches(5.8), Inches(2.8))
    left_col.fill.solid()
    left_col.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
    left_col.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), Inches(3.7), Inches(5.0), Inches(0.4), "Ce que vous obtenez", font_size=20, bold=True, color=DARK_NAVY)

    benefits = [
        ("Paiement sous 5 jours ouvrables", "Virement direct sur votre compte"),
        ("Suivi en temps réel", "Notifications par email et SMS"),
        ("Assistance dédiée", "Un conseiller vous accompagne"),
    ]

    y_pos = Inches(4.2)
    for b_title, b_desc in benefits:
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.0), y_pos, Inches(5.0), Inches(0.3), f"✓ {b_title}", font_size=14, bold=True, color=DARK_NAVY)
        add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.2), y_pos + Inches(0.25), Inches(5.0), Inches(0.3), b_desc, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)
        y_pos += Inches(0.65)

    right_col = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(6.8), Inches(3.5), Inches(5.9), Inches(2.8))
    right_col.fill.solid()
    right_col.fill.fore_color.rgb = PRIMARY_BLUE
    right_col.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.3), Inches(4.0), Inches(5.0), Inches(0.5), "Garantie de résultat", font_size=22, bold=True, color=WHITE)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(7.3), Inches(4.6), Inches(5.0), Inches(1.5), "Nous nous engageons à traiter votre dossier dans les délais annoncés. En cas de retard, vous bénéficiez d'une indemnité automatique.", font_size=14, color=RGBColor(200, 220, 255))

    add_footer(slide, 8, 12)


def slide_9_chart(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title = slide.shapes.title
    if title is not None:
        title.text = ""
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Comparaison des délais de traitement"
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_NAVY

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Réduction de 67% du temps moyen de traitement", font_size=16, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    chart_data = CategoryChartData()
    chart_data.categories = ["Sinistre auto", "Sinistre habitation", "Sinistre santé", "Sinistre voyage"]
    chart_data.add_series("Ancien processus", (30, 25, 20, 18))
    chart_data.add_series("Nouveau processus", (10, 8, 6, 5))

    chart_frame = slide.shapes.add_chart(
        XL_CHART_TYPE.COLUMN_CLUSTERED,
        Inches(1.0), Inches(2.0), Inches(11.3), Inches(4.5),
        chart_data
    )
    chart = chart_frame.chart
    chart.has_legend = True
    chart.legend.include_in_layout = False

    series_old = chart.series[0]
    series_old.data_labels.show_value = True
    series_old.format.fill.solid()
    series_old.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY

    series_new = chart.series[1]
    series_new.data_labels.show_value = True
    series_new.format.fill.solid()
    series_new.format.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_TEAL

    value_axis = chart.value_axis
    value_axis.maximum_scale = 35
    value_axis.has_title = False

    cat_axis = chart.category_axis
    cat_axis.tick_labels.font.size = Pt(10)

    add_footer(slide, 9, 12)


def slide_10_benefits(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title = slide.shapes.title
    if title is not None:
        title.text = ""
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Vos Avantages Concrets"
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_NAVY

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Ce que le nouveau processus change pour vous", font_size=16, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    benefits_data = [
        ("⏱️", "Gain de temps", "Traitement 3x plus rapide"),
        ("📊", "Transparence totale", "Suivi en temps réel"),
        ("💬", "Communication fluide", "Notifications automatiques"),
        ("🤝", "Accompagnement humain", "Conseiller dédié"),
        ("✅", "Sérénité garantie", "Résultat sous 7 jours"),
    ]

    for i, (icon, b_title, b_desc) in enumerate(benefits_data):
        x = Inches(1.0 + (i % 3) * 4.0)
        y = Inches(2.2 + (i // 3) * 2.5)

        card_bg = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, Inches(3.6), Inches(2.1))
        card_bg.fill.solid()
        card_bg.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
        card_bg.line.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        card_bg.line.width = Pt(1)

        icon_box = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(0.8), Inches(0.8))
        icon_box.fill.solid()
        icon_box.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_TEAL
        icon_box.line.fill.background()

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(1.3), y + Inches(0.35), Inches(2.0), Inches(0.4), b_title, font_size=16, bold=True, color=DARK_NAVY)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(1.2), Inches(3.0), Inches(0.7), b_desc, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 10, 12)


def slide_11_support(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#FFFFFF")

    title = slide.shapes.title
    if title is not None:
        title.text = ""
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Support et Ressources"
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(32)
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = DARK_NAVY

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(1.4), Inches(8), Inches(0.4), "Nous sommes toujours à votre écoute", font_size=16, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    channels = [
        ("📞 Téléphone", "0 800 123 456", "Lun-Ven : 8h-20h"),
        ("✉️ Email", "sinistre@assurance-confiance.fr", "Réponse sous 24h"),
        ("💬 Chat en direct", "Disponible sur l'app mobile", "Lun-Dim : 7h-23h"),
        ("🏢 Agence locale", "Trouvez votre agence", "www.assurance-confiance.fr/agences"),
    ]

    for i, (ch_title, ch_contact, ch_hours) in enumerate(channels):
        x = Inches(1.0 + (i % 2) * 6.0)
        y = Inches(2.2 + (i // 2) * 2.5)

        card_bg = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.ROUNDED_RECTANGLE, x, y, Inches(5.4), Inches(2.1))
        card_bg.fill.solid()
        card_bg.fill.fore_color.rgb = WHITE
        card_bg.line.color.rgb = LIGHT_GRAY
        card_bg.line.width = Pt(1)

        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.25), Inches(4.8), Inches(0.4), ch_title, font_size=18, bold=True, color=DARK_NAVY)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(0.75), Inches(4.8), Inches(0.4), ch_contact, font_size=14, color=PRIMARY_BLUE)
        add_text_box(slide, x + Inches(0.3), y + Inches(1.2), Inches(4.8), Inches(0.4), ch_hours, font_size=12, color=MEDIUM_GRAY)

    add_footer(slide, 11, 12)


def slide_12_closing(prs):
    slide = prs.slides.add_slide(prs.slide_layouts[6])
    set_slide_background(slide, "#003DA5")

    top_bar = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.RECTANGLE, Inches(0), Inches(0), SLIDE_WIDTH, Inches(3.2))
    top_bar.fill.solid()
    top_bar.fill.fore_color.rgb = DARK_NAVY
    top_bar.line.fill.background()

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(0.8), Inches(10), Inches(0.4), "ASSURANCE CONFIANCE", font_size=14, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    title = slide.shapes.title
    if title is not None:
        title.text = ""
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].text = "Merci de votre confiance"
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.size = Pt(42)
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.bold = True
        title.text_frame.paragraphs[0].font.color.rgb = WHITE

    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(3.6), Inches(10), Inches(0.5), "Votre sinistre est notre priorité", font_size=24, color=ACCENT_TEAL)
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(1.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(10), Inches(1.0), "Nous sommes fiers de vous offrir un service de qualité et un accompagnement personnalisé à chaque étape.", font_size=16, color=RGBColor(200, 220, 255))

    badge = slide.shapes.add_shape(MSO_SHAPE.OVAL, Inches(4.5), Inches(5.5), Inches(4.3), Inches(0.7))
    badge.fill.solid()
    badge.fill.fore_color.rgb = ACCENT_TEAL
    badge.line.fill.background()
    add_text_box(slide, Inches(4.6), Inches(5.55), Inches(4.1), Inches(0.6), "Commencer ma déclaration →", font_size=14, bold=True, color=WHITE)

    add_footer(slide, 12, 12)


def main():
    prs = Presentation()
    prs.slide_width = SLIDE_WIDTH
    prs.slide_height = SLIDE_HEIGHT

    slide_1_title(prs)
    slide_2_agenda(prs)
    slide_3_challenges(prs)
    slide_4_solution(prs)
    slide_5_step1(prs)
    slide_6_step2(prs)
    slide_7_step3(prs)
    slide_8_step4(prs)
    slide_9_chart(prs)
    slide_10_benefits(prs)
    slide_11_support(prs)
    slide_12_closing(prs)

    prs.save("Claims_Process.pptx")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
